languages.text: {n}Техножрец взирает на вас единственным визором. Затерянный в сплетениях металла и проводов, вокс-передатчик, заменяющий служителю {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} рот, шипит:{/n} "Сканирую жизнеформу... визит зафиксирован. Приветствую Лорд-капитана в Секторе Бионика, Вас будет принимать {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} мажорис Ферренц". {n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Техножрец{/g} поворачивается, и вы вдруг осознаете, что до этого он стоял к вам спиной: лицевая часть его головы усеяна вспыхнувшими визорами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Техножрец взирает на вас единственным визором. Затерянный в сплетениях металла и проводов, вокс-передатчик, заменяющий служителю {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} рот, шипит:{/n} "Сканирую жизнеформу... визит зафиксирован. Приветствую Лорд-капитана в Секторе Бионика, Вас будет принимать {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} мажорис Ферренц". {n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Техножрец{/g} поворачивается, и вы вдруг осознаете, что до этого он стоял к вам спиной: лицевая часть его головы усеяна вспыхнувшими визорами.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The Tech-Priest stares at you with a single visor. Amidst a tangle of metal and wires, the vox-caster replacing his mouth hisses:{/n} "Scanning life form... Visit registered. Welcome to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain. You will be received by {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} turns, and you suddenly realise that he was standing with his back to you — the front of his head is covered in blinking visors.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрец взирает на вас единственным визором. Затерянный в сплетениях металла и проводов, вокс-передатчик, заменяющий служителю {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} рот, шипит:{/n} "Сканирую жизнеформу... визит зафиксирован. languages.text: {n}テクプリストは1つのバイザーであなたを見つめている。金属とワイヤーの絡み合った中、彼の口の代わりにヴォックスキャスターがヒスする。{/n}「あなたの訪問は登録されました。セクター・ビオニカへようこそ、ロード・キャプテン。あなたは、サージュオン・セコンダリス・ゲネトール・フェレンツに迎えられます」{n}テクプリストは振り返り、あなたは突然気づいた。彼は背を向けて立っていたのだ。彼の頭部は、点滅するバイザーで覆われている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest stares at you with a single visor. Amidst a tangle of metal and wires, the vox-caster replacing his mouth hisses:{/n} "Your visit has been registered. Welcome to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain. You will be received by Chirurgeon Secundaris Genetor Ferrenz." {n}The Tech-Priest turns, and you suddenly realise that he was standing with his back to you — the front of his head is covered in blinking visors.{/n}

traits.locale_text: テクプリストは1つのバイザーであなたを見つめている。金属とワイヤーの絡み合った中、彼の口の代わりにヴォックスキャスターがヒスする。{n}「あなたの訪問は登録されました。セクター・ビオニカへようこそ、ロード・キャプテン。あなたは、サージュオン・セコンダリス・ゲネトール・フェレンツに迎えられます。」{n}テクプリストは振り返り、あなたは突然気づいた。彼は背を向けて立っていたのだ。彼の頭部は、点滅するバイザーで覆われている。

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, tek bir vizörle sana bakıyor. Metal ve kablo yumağının ortasında ağzının yerini alan voksyayar tıslıyor.{/n} "Yaşam formu taranıyor. Ziyaret kaydedildi. Sektör Biyonika'ya hoş geldiniz Lord Kaptan. Sizi {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Başgenetör{/g} Ferrenz karşılayacak." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g} dönüyor, o sırada önceden sırtının sana dönük olduğunu fark ediyorsun. Kafasının ön tarafı, yanıp sönen vizörlerle kaplı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest stares at you with a single visor. Amidst a tangle of metal and wires, the vox-caster replacing his mouth hisses:{/n} "Scanning life form... Visit registered. Welcome to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain. You will be received by {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} turns, and you suddenly realise that he was standing with his back to you — the front of his head is covered in blinking visors.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip, tek bir vizörle sana bakıyor. Metal ve kablo yumağının ortasında ağzının yerini alan voksyayar tıslıyor.{/n} "Yaşam formu taranıyor. Ziyaret kaydedildi. Sektör Biyonika'ya hoş geldiniz Lord Kaptan. Sizi {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Başgenetör{/g} Ferrenz karşılayacak." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g} dönüyor, o sırada önceden sırtının sana dönük olduğunu fark ediyorsun. Kafasının ön tarafı, yanıp sönen vizörlerle kaplı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote te observa con un solo visor. Entre una maraña de cables y metal, el voco amplificador que reemplaza su boca sisea:{/n} «Analizando forma de vida... Visita registrada. Bienvenid{mf|o|a} al Sector Bionica, Lord Capitán. L{mf|e|a} recibe el {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor majoris{/g} Ferrenz». {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} se gira y comprendes de repente que te estaba dando la espalda: la parte delantera de su cabeza está cubierta de visores parpadeantes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest stares at you with a single visor. Amidst a tangle of metal and wires, the vox-caster replacing his mouth hisses:{/n} "Scanning life form... Visit registered. Welcome to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain. You will be received by {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} turns, and you suddenly realise that he was standing with his back to you — the front of his head is covered in blinking visors.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El tecnosacerdote te observa con un solo visor. Entre una maraña de cables y metal, el voco amplificador que reemplaza su boca sisea:{/n} «Analizando forma de vida... Visita registrada. Bienvenid{mf|o|a} al Sector Bionica, Lord Capitán. L{mf|e|a} recibe el {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor majoris{/g} Ferrenz». {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} se gira y comprendes de repente que te estaba dando la espalda: la parte delantera de su cabeza está cubierta de visores parpadeantes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这位技术神甫用单只目镜盯着你。金属和线缆纠缠间，替代他嘴部的通讯器嘶嘶作响：{/n}“正在扫描生命体……访问已登记。欢迎来到仿生区，舰长大人。高级{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}费伦茨恭候您的大驾。”{n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}转过身，你才意识到他之前是背对着你的——他的整个面甲满是闪烁的目镜。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest stares at you with a single visor. Amidst a tangle of metal and wires, the vox-caster replacing his mouth hisses:{/n} "Scanning life form... Visit registered. Welcome to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain. You will be received by {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} turns, and you suddenly realise that he was standing with his back to you — the front of his head is covered in blinking visors.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这位技术神甫用单只目镜盯着你。金属和线缆纠缠间，替代他嘴部的通讯器嘶嘶作响：{/n}“正在扫描生命体……访问已登记。欢迎来到仿生区，舰长大人。高级{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}费伦茨恭候您的大驾。”{n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}转过身，你才意识到他之前是背对着你的——他的整个面甲满是闪烁的目镜。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre vous fixe d'une unique visière. Parmi un enchevêtrement de métal et de câbles, l'émetteur vox remplaçant sa bouche se met à siffler :{/n} « Analyse de l'entité... Visite enregistrée. Bienvenue dans le secteur Bionica, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Le {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz va vous recevoir. » {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} vous fait face et vous réalisez alors qu'il vous tournait le dos jusqu'à maintenant. L'avant de sa tête est couvert de visières clignotantes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest stares at you with a single visor. Amidst a tangle of metal and wires, the vox-caster replacing his mouth hisses:{/n} "Scanning life form... Visit registered. Welcome to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain. You will be received by {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} turns, and you suddenly realise that he was standing with his back to you — the front of his head is covered in blinking visors.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le technoprêtre vous fixe d'une unique visière. Parmi un enchevêtrement de métal et de câbles, l'émetteur vox remplaçant sa bouche se met à siffler :{/n} « Analyse de l'entité... Visite enregistrée. Bienvenue dans le secteur Bionica, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Le {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz va vous recevoir. » {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} vous fait face et vous réalisez alors qu'il vous tournait le dos jusqu'à maintenant. L'avant de sa tête est couvert de visières clignotantes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Techpriester starrt dich mit einem einzigen Visor an. Aus einem Gewirr von Metall und Kabeln zischt sein Vox-Transmitter, der seinen Mund ersetzt:{/n} "Scanne Lebensform ... Besuch registriert. Willkommen im Sektor Bionica, Lord Captain. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz wird Euch empfangen." {n}Der {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} wendet sich ab und du erkennst plötzlich, dass er mit dem Rücken zu dir stand — die Vorderseite seines Kopfes ist mit blinkenden Visoren bedeckt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest stares at you with a single visor. Amidst a tangle of metal and wires, the vox-caster replacing his mouth hisses:{/n} "Scanning life form... Visit registered. Welcome to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain. You will be received by {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Majoris Ferrenz." {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} turns, and you suddenly realise that he was standing with his back to you — the front of his head is covered in blinking visors.{/n}
